top_signals.title: U.S. and Iran trade airstrikes again amid conflicting claims over the Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: The U.S. and Iran exchanged a barrage of missile and drone airstrikes amid a dispute over the status of the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
